description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a structured silhouette and two long, sturdy handles attached at the top. The exterior is adorned with a striking abstract pattern in shades of red, black, and beige, giving it a bold and artistic appearance. The upper section of the bag is a solid dark color, likely black or deep brown, which contrasts with the vibrant lower portion. The front side displays a small, centered brand logo in gold, adding a touch of elegance. The handles appear to be made of leather or faux leather, stitched securely to the bag for durability. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A structured handbag with long handles, featuring an abstract red, black, and beige pattern and a small gold logo on the front. The upper section is a solid dark color, contrasting with the vibrant lower half.
description_view_0: Front view showing the abstract pattern, solid dark upper section, and a small gold logo at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's narrow profile and the attachment of the two long handles.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full abstract pattern and solid dark upper section, without the logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's slim profile and handle attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, gold rectangular logo with the text 'TAPAI' is centered on the front upper section of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, fixed handles suitable for hand or shoulder carry, attached at the top with visible stitching.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Closure mechanism not explicitly visible, but likely a zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
attribute_pattern: Abstract, symmetrical pattern in red, black, and beige tones on the main body of the bag.
